module_sme_rollup.name: Core Accounting & Ledger
module_sme_rollup.description: Foundational general ledger, sub-ledger reconciliation, and transaction posting with audit controls.

statements.text: Configure chart of accounts with hierarchical categories and post journal entries with automatic balancing.
statements.rationale: Foundation for all financial recording

statements.text: Reconcile bank, receivables, payables, and asset sub-ledgers to general ledger monthly.
statements.rationale: Ensures accuracy and completeness of records

statements.text: Control period and year open-close with posting locks, retained earnings rollover, and audit trail.
statements.rationale: Prevents unauthorized changes to closed periods

statements.text: Tag all transactions with multiple dimensions: department, cost centre, project, location.
statements.rationale: Enables multi-dimensional reporting and cost allocation

statements.text: Record immutable audit trail of who, when, and what for every transaction and change.
statements.rationale: Meets regulatory and internal control requirements

module_sme_rollup.name: Receivables, Payables & Cash
module_sme_rollup.description: Customer invoicing, vendor payments, cash management, and collections workflows.

statements.text: Create and auto-email invoices with tax calculations; apply customer payments flexibly across invoices.
statements.rationale: Streamlines billing and cash collection

statements.text: Match supplier invoices to purchase orders and goods receipts; route bills through approval workflows.
statements.rationale: Prevents duplicate and fraudulent payments

statements.text: Import bank statements and reconcile to cash ledger automatically with configurable matching rules.
statements.rationale: Reduces manual reconciliation effort and errors

statements.text: Schedule and execute payment runs in SEPA, ACH, and local formats; apply early-payment discounts.
statements.rationale: Optimizes cash outflow and reduces financing costs

statements.text: Set customer credit limits, monitor exposure, and execute automated dunning sequences by aging.
statements.rationale: Reduces bad debt and improves cash collection

statements.text: Generate customer and vendor ageing analysis, receivables statements, and payment forecasts.
statements.rationale: Supports cash planning and collections management

module_sme_rollup.name: Tax, Compliance & Reporting
module_sme_rollup.description: Tax calculation, statutory compliance, financial statements, and audit readiness.

statements.text: Configure tax codes and automatically calculate tax on sales and purchases at line and document level.
statements.rationale: Ensures accurate tax treatment and compliance

statements.text: Track input and output tax separately; generate periodic tax returns in country-specific format.
statements.rationale: Simplifies tax return filing and audit

statements.text: Generate profit and loss, balance sheet, cash flow, and trial balance by period with drill-down.
statements.rationale: Provides timely financial visibility to stakeholders

statements.text: Compare financial statements across periods and against budget; calculate financial ratios.
statements.rationale: Enables variance analysis and performance monitoring

statements.text: Map general ledger to XBRL taxonomy; validate and generate ACRA-compliant filing packages.
statements.rationale: Automates statutory filing and reduces submission errors

statements.text: Export financial statements to PDF, Excel, CSV; provide auditor read-only access and audit bundles.
statements.rationale: Facilitates external audit and stakeholder reporting

module_sme_rollup.name: Planning, Budgeting & Analysis
module_sme_rollup.description: Budget management, forecasting, project costing, and financial analytics.

statements.text: Create annual budgets by account, department, cost centre, project; support multiple versions.
statements.rationale: Enables financial planning and control

statements.text: Display actual versus budget variance on all financial reports; track purchase order encumbrances.
statements.rationale: Monitors spending against approved budgets

statements.text: Capture timesheet and expense entries; assign project codes and cost centres for cost tracking.
statements.rationale: Enables project profitability and cost allocation

statements.text: Calculate work-in-progress and recognize revenue by percentage of completion; generate project profitability reports.
statements.rationale: Supports project-based revenue recognition

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your finance system is accessible, secure, and connected to the rest of your business. Singapore SMEs must comply with PDPA data protection rules and need staff to access financial data safely from anywhere—especially in hybrid work environments. It matters when your accountant needs to approve an invoice from a client site, or when you're sending tax data to ACRA or your auditor.

Core Ledger & Close.narrative: This is the backbone of financial accounting—it records every transaction in double-entry format, generates your statutory accounts, and tracks fixed assets and depreciation. Every Singapore SME must produce audited or reviewed financial statements for tax and compliance; this family automates the monthly close and ensures your numbers are accurate and auditable. It matters when you're closing the books at month-end or preparing for your annual audit.

Revenue Cycle.narrative: This family handles customer invoicing, payment collection, and credit management—the lifeblood of cash flow. Singapore SMEs need to issue invoices quickly, track who owes money, and collect on time; e-invoicing via InvoiceNow is now a competitive advantage and reduces manual data entry. It matters when you're chasing a late payment from a key customer or need to issue a credit note without manual rework.

Expense Cycle.narrative: This family captures supplier bills, employee expenses, and purchase orders, then routes them for approval and payment. SMEs waste time on manual expense claims and invoice matching; automating this cycle frees up your finance team and reduces errors. It matters when your sales team submits a travel claim or when you need to match a supplier invoice to a purchase order before paying.

Treasury & Compliance.narrative: This family manages your bank accounts, cash flow, tax obligations, and multi-currency transactions—critical for compliance and survival. Singapore SMEs must file GST returns on time and reconcile bank statements; forecasting cash flow helps you avoid running out of money. It matters when you're preparing your GST F5 return or need to know if you have enough cash to pay suppliers next week.

Planning & Analytics.narrative: This family lets you build budgets, compare actual spending to plan, and see financial health at a glance via dashboards. SMEs often run on gut feel; budgeting and analytics help you spot trends, control costs, and make faster decisions. It matters when your CFO wants to see year-to-date profit by department, or when you need to forecast next quarter's cash position.
